title: GME CTB, Short %, and FTDs [theUltimator5]
author: TheUltimator5
summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: GME CTB, Short %, and FTDs [theUltimator5] by TheUltimator5.
This indicator shows GameStop (GME): Cost to borrow (%) Short % FTDs The FTD numbers completely overwhelm the other values when displayed normally, so the value has been divided by 50,000.
For all the FTD numbers, multiply by 50,000 to get the actual numbers.
The numbers have all been hard coded in as of 06 March 2026.
